channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: US-Israeli attacks on Iran are ‘clear and obvious war crimes’
item.description: ‘We’re in the time of monsters right now where we are headed towards the law of the jungle’.

item.title: Can Africa tackle the oil shock from the Iran war?
item.description: African nations are scrambling to secure oil and gas as the Iran war disrupts supplies from the Middle East.

item.title: Palestine weekly wrap: Protests sweep West Bank after death penalty law
item.description: Israeli strikes on Gaza escalate with children among the injured and civilians killed in densely populated areas.

item.title: How US, Israel are waging a war on Iranian culture, education
item.description: Iranian officials have told Al Jazeera the US and Israel's attacks seek to wipe out Iranian identity.

item.title: Iranian missile strike damages cars and street in Israel
item.description: Video shows damaged sidewalks and an overturned car following an Iranian missile strike on Ramat Hasharon in IsraeL.

item.title: Ukraine, Russia kill three civilians each in tit-for-tat drone attacks
item.description: Drone attacks killed civilians in Russia and Ukraine, a day after Zelenskyy renewed his Easter ceasefire offer.

item.title: Three killed in shooting near Israeli consulate in Turkiye’s Istanbul
item.description: Two police officers were also injured in the gunfire incident near the Israeli consulate.

item.title: US-Israeli strikes destroy buildings in northern Iran
item.description: Video shows widespread destruction in Pardis, northern Iran. The Israeli military said they bombed Iran on April 7.

item.title: USA striker Patrick Agyemang’s World Cup in doubt after stretcher exit
item.description: Agyemang looked emotional as he was stretchered off after an awkward fall during an English Championship game.

item.title: ‘Military action is not an effective means to pursue nonproliferation’
item.description: 'We’re now seeing very concerning strikes on nuclear facilities in Iran that risk further radioactive contamination.'
